title: Drones Used to Fight Mosquitoes as Dengue Fever Surges in Sri Lanka
summary_full: The military has joined the battle against the insects, as an outbreak strains hospitals in a country already reeling from energy shortages caused by the Iran War.
summary_public: The military has joined the battle against the insects, as an outbreak strains hospitals in a country already reeling from energy shortages caused by the Iran War.

IR.label: negative
